questions.text: What DECAY rate per-session preserves stable associations while fading stale ones — BCM theory, STDP, homeostatic plasticity?
What Hebbian/LTD decay implementations exist in knowledge graph and memory systems (Zep, Graphiti, MemGPT, Letta)?
How does synaptic depression (LTD) work mechanistically in STDP — the mathematical form of the decay rule?
How quickly do human interests shift — what timescales are meaningful for a daily-use personal memory system?
What graph quality metrics exist for measuring whether edge weights encode current topology vs historical accumulation?
